preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v San Diego FC: Varas seeking consistency ahead of playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC are aiming to regain their winning form ahead of the 2025 playoffs, starting with a trip to the Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo vs. San Diego FC: Varas busca consistencia antes de los playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC busca recuperar su forma ganadora antes de los playoffs de 2025, comenzando con un viaje al Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo - San Diego FC: Varas cerca la continuità prima dei playoff
preReview.description: San Diego FC punta a ritrovare la forma vincente in vista dei playoff 2025, iniziando con una trasferta contro Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo x San Diego FC: Varas busca consistência antes dos playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC está buscando retomar sua forma vencedora antes dos playoffs de 2025, começando com uma viagem para enfrentar o Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo contre San Diego FC : Varas cherche la constance avant les playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC vise à retrouver sa forme victorieuse avant les playoffs de 2025, en commençant par un déplacement chez les Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo gegen San Diego FC: Varas sucht Beständigkeit vor den Playoffs
preReview.description: San Diego FC strebt danach, vor den Playoffs 2025 wieder in die Siegerspur zu finden, beginnend mit einem Auswärtsspiel gegen die Houston Dynamo.

preReview.title: هيوستن دينامو ضد سان دييغو إف سي: فاراس يسعى للثبات قبل انطلاق الأدوار الإقصائية
preReview.description: يهدف فريق سان دييغو إف سي إلى استعادة أدائهم الفائز قبل الأدوار الإقصائية لعام 2025، بدءًا من مواجهة فريق هيوستن دينامو.

preReview.title: Houston Dynamo x San Diego FC: Varas busca consistência antes dos playoffs
preReview.description: O San Diego FC está tentando recuperar sua forma vitoriosa antes dos playoffs de 2025, começando com uma viagem ao Houston Dynamo.

QAData.question: Who won between Houston Dynamo FC and San Diego FC on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Diego FC won 4–2 over Houston Dynamo FC on Sun, 05 Oct 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
